## Plots per parcel

```{r}
#| label: plots per parcel table

plots_per_parcel_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "plots_per_parcel_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::plots_per_parcel(
  parcel_plot_df = plots_per_parcel_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  parcel_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(params_df$plots_per_parcel_parcel_id_var),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
